violations.text: Various foods were observed held above 41 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Items to be stored in half portions. Portioned items like chicken and turkey shall be stored in a single layer in the prep unit while in use. Lids must be used for foods to help maintain an adequate temperature. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Proper use of hand sink discussed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026

Various food were observed held above 41 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were recently placed in prep unit, foods were relocated to walk-in. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026

The prep unit was observed unable to maintain various foods at 41 degrees or less. Unit to be stocked in half portions until unit is serviced/repaired/or replaced. Unit has been repaired numerous times over past year. Unit must be replaced if unable to maintain foods at adequate temperature after service. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026

ROP Lobster was observed thawing with package still in tact. ROP Lobster seal must be broken BEFORE lobster is thawed. Proper thawing procedures reviewed with PIC. Lobster was disposed of. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

Inspector observed dead rodents on traps in basement.PIC removed from premises. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment to increase services to biweekly.PIC to provide inspector with proof of services. Failure to comply will result in further disciplinary actions. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023
The walk in freezer in the kitchen area is in poor repair(ice buildup). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the lactic acid sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives) were observed with an accumulation of food residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023

ROP lobster was observed held at (68) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023

Inspector observed dead rodents on traps in basement.PIC removed from premises. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment to increase pest control services to 1x monthly. PIC to provide inspector with proof of services Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023
The walk in freezer located in the kitchen area is in poor repair(ice buildup). New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the lactic acid sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the food storage and prep area shelves throughout the kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023

The floors and stairs in the basement area has an accumulation of soil residue,debris, and rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023
